capabilities.name: Normalized order lines (not JSONB)
capabilities.verify: order_items table exists + populated by create-checkout (sandbox+Stripe); variant_id + tax_rate_pct FK added (migration 20260610150000)
capabilities.notes: Lines already normalized in order_items; variant_id link added + verified on real schema 2026-06-11. Optional later: legacy metadata-only backfill. Re: 01.4 'POS sells variants' — correction: this is skill-only today. record_pos_sale (src/lib/modules/pos-module.ts ~L151) accepts variant_id and resolves SKU/price, but the human cashier UI (POSPage.tsx / usePOS.ts) has no variant picker at all — no product_variant reference anywhere in that UI. Per the dual-surface law this caps at partial, not done; tracked here as a note since there is no dedicated pos.json capability id for it.

capabilities.name: Multiple units of measure
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3, after re-emit 20260705170000 applied): convert_uom skill through the full chain (gateway /rest/execute → agent-execute → RPC) returned 2.5 for 2500 g→kg; direct RPC also verified 1500 kg→t = 1.5 and cross-category (g→Unit) correctly REJECTED ('Cannot convert between UoMs in different categories'); manage_uom list returned the seeded catalog (Unit ref + Weight: kg ref / g 0.001 / t 1000). Mechanism: uom_categories + uoms (factor-to-reference) + convert_uom(p_qty,p_from_uom,p_to_uom) (re-emit migration 20260705170000) + manage_uom (db:uoms) / convert_uom (rpc:) skills; admin UI = SalesUomSelect.tsx wired into ProductDialog.tsx (per-product sales-unit picker → products.sales_uom_id)
capabilities.notes: Drift saga closed 2026-07-05: the original back-dated 20260610170000 was silently skipped by the migration ledger (tables landed, function + seeds did not), AND the first convert_uom skill seed had wrong param names (p_quantity/p_from_uom_id/… vs the real p_qty/p_from_uom/p_to_uom — exposed by the PGRST202 hint). Both fixed: forward-dated re-emit + corrected tool_definition, deployed via Lovable, re-verified live end-to-end. Remaining depth (not blocking done): purchase-vs-sales UoM per product and automatic line-level conversion on orders — Odoo converts qty on order lines; FlowWink stores a per-product sales UoM + exposes conversion as a skill/RPC.

capabilities.name: Partial shipment / partial fulfillment
capabilities.verify: order_items.qty_fulfilled + fulfill_order_line RPC/skill (migration 20260610180000); order ships only when all lines complete
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: fulfill_order_line via agent-execute (3/5 → qty_fulfilled=3, order ships when all lines complete); UI = OrderLineFulfillment.
